notes: Two-view layout and overall silhouette of the loligo are recognizable, but the rendering reads as a noisy photo-trace rather than clean FAO linework with broken contours and unresolved arms.
specific_issues: fragmented/broken contour lines instead of single continuous silhouette
arms and tentacles not resolved into discrete 8+2 arrangement — appear as a tangle of short line segments
fin on dorsal view has jagged angular notches rather than smooth rhomboidal outline
eye on lateral view is messy and lacks a clean almond shape with small filled pupil
stipple is scattered noise rather than concentrated in chromatophore/shadow fields visible in photo
many small disconnected interior strokes give photo-trace clutter atypical of FAO plates
head-mantle junction lacks the clean transition seen in the photo
